title: Rhythm: numeric drill
description: Rhythm with all 10 digits - build numeric fluency

tips.text: No new keys. We work the rhythm with plain words, so your hands learn an even pace before the figures crowd in.
Keep your fingers on home position and your eyes up. Repeat each word at one calm tempo, the same beat throughout. Don't let the pace drift.

tips.title: Steady count
tips.text: Keep equal time between keys, like a metronome ticking quietly behind you. Even and slow beats quick and uneven. Even keystrokes read like clean copy.

tips.title: Rhythm: phone
tips.hint: Repeat at one even pace: phone phone phone. Hold the same beat from first key to last.

tips.title: Rhythm: year
tips.hint: Repeat at one even pace: year year year. Hold the same beat from first key to last.

tips.title: Rhythm: zip
tips.hint: Repeat at one even pace: zip zip zip. Hold the same beat from first key to last.

tips.text: Numbers reward a steady hand more than most text does. Build the even rhythm now on simple words, and the rows of digits will hold no fear.
Worked through every step? Open the trainer below and make one full run on the lesson text. That run saves your progress and unlocks the next lesson.

character_tips.anna: Number rhythm - type sequences without thinking.
character_tips.maxim: Real numbers in real contexts. Phone, zip, year. This is daily typing.
